sources.title: Physical AI and Humanoid Robots — Deloitte Tech Trends 2026
sources.claim: Pilots are turning into production reality, with the paradigm shifting from specialized machines to general-purpose Physical AI in 2026.

sources.title: Humanoid Robot Market Size, Share & Trends 2025–2030 — 39.2% CAGR
sources.claim: Global humanoid robot market valued at $2.92B in 2025, projected to reach $15.26B by 2030 at 39.2% CAGR.

sources.title: NVIDIA Releases New Physical AI Models as Global Partners Unveil Next-Generation Robots
sources.claim: GR00T N1.6 VLA model released Jan 2026; 100+ robotics companies partnering with NVIDIA Isaac platform.

sources.title: From Prototypes to Production: Tesla Optimus Humanoid Robots Take Charge of the Factory Floor
sources.claim: Tesla deployed 1,000+ Optimus units inside Gigafactory Texas in Jan 2026, performing battery cell sorting, logistics kitting, and parts assembly.

sources.title: China Releases First National Standard Framework for Humanoid Robots and Embodied AI
sources.claim: China published 'Humanoid Robot and Embodied Intelligence Standard System (2026 edition)' in February 2026, the world's first national-level humanoid governance framework.

sources.title: Humanoid Robot Market Size 2026–2032 — 48.8% CAGR, reaching $69.74B by 2032
sources.claim: Global humanoid robot market valued at $4.32B in 2025, projected to reach $69.74B by 2032 at 48.8% CAGR.

sources.title: Physical AI Use Cases Being Adopted by Enterprises — BizTech Magazine May 2026
sources.claim: Enterprise adoption of physical AI spanning manufacturing, logistics, healthcare, and construction as of May 2026.

sources.title: Figure AI IPO 2026: $39B Valuation, Risks & Bull Case
sources.claim: Figure AI IPO anticipated in 2026 at $39B+ valuation; 11 months continuous BMW factory deployment; BotQ facility tooled for 12,000 units/year.

sources.title: Whose Leading the Way in Robotics, Humanoids & Physical AI in 2026
sources.claim: Market leaders Unitree, Agibot, Engine AI, UBTech, Boston Dynamics hold combined 58.2% market share; Chinese manufacturers hold ~90% of global unit volume.

sources.title: How Physical AI Is Reshaping Robotics Today — and What Comes Next
sources.claim: Physical AI transitioning from specialized industrial robots to general-purpose platforms; BCG analysis of deployment trends across OEM partners.

sources.title: Q1 2026 Shatters Venture Funding Records as AI Boom Pushes Startup Investment to $300B
sources.claim: Q1 2026 global VC hit $300B total; AI received $242B (80% of total). Robotics funding surged 300% in Q4 2025.

sources.title: China Creates Digital ID for Humanoid Robots
sources.claim: China implemented a digital ID system for humanoid robots in May 2026, enabling rapid fault diagnosis and liability determination.

sources.title: Humanoid Robots Market 2025–2032: Leaders Unitree, UBTech, and Boston Dynamics Dominate
sources.claim: Unitree shipped 5,500+ humanoid robots in 2025, targeting 10,000–20,000 in 2026; Chinese manufacturers hold ~90% of global unit volume.

sources.title: Physical AI Market Size, Share & Growth — MarketsandMarkets
sources.claim: Physical AI industry projected to reach $15.24B by 2032 from $1.50B in 2026, growing at 47.2% CAGR.

sources.title: CSET Physical AI Primer for Policymakers — February 2026
sources.publisher: Center for Security and Emerging Technology (Georgetown)
sources.claim: US considering executive order to support domestic robotics industry; Physical AI as national security consideration; US-China strategic competition framing.

unverified_claims: Pew Research statistic: '65% of Americans support robots in dangerous manufacturing jobs' — cited in consumer sentiment context; exact Pew report not confirmed via search.
Humanoid robot market was valued at $307.6M in 2021 — figures vary significantly across research firms ($307M to $1.46B); use conservative estimate.
Goldman Sachs '50,000–100,000 unit' 2026 shipment projection — widely cited but original Goldman report behind paywall; attributed to multiple secondary sources.
